Liang Ji śĘĀŚĻĺ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Ji (śĘĀŚĻĺ). Sent by Sima Yi as messenger to Meng Da, tricking him into revolt. Liang Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
